zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertrade de Montfort於1155年6月2日出生在法國諾門迪艾時，她的父親Simon de Montfort III33歲，母親Mathilde de Beaumont35歲。她於1169年與Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1227年3月31日在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福享年71歲。

zh-hans.Denonville, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France: 法国艾-吉洛易丹諾維爾
zh-hans.Leicester, Leicestershire, England: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertrade de Montfort于1155年6月2日出生在法国諾門迪艾时，她的父亲Simon de Montfort III33岁，母亲Mathilde de Beaumont35岁。她于1169年与Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1227年3月31日在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertrade de Montfort was born on 2 June 1155, in Eure, Normandy, France, her father, Simon de Montfort III, was 33 and her mother, Mathilde de Beaumont, was 35. She married Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester in 1169. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 31 March 1227, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertrade de Montfort est née le 2 juin 1155, à Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Simon de Montfort III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Beaumont, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester en 1169. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1227, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertrade de Montfort am 2. Juni 1155 in Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Montfort III 33 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Beaumont 35. Sie hat 1169 Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. März 1227 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrade de Montfort è nata il il 2 giugno 1155 nel Eure, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Simon de Montfort III, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Beaumont, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester nel 1169. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 marzo 1227, nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertrade de Montfortが1155年6月2日にフランスノーマンディエウアで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfort IIIは33歳，母Mathilde de Beaumontは35歳であった。1169年にHugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1227年3月31日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertrade de Montfort(이)가 1155년 6월 2일 프랑스 노먼디 우르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Montfort III(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Beaumont(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1169년 Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1227년 3월 31일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 June 1155–31 March 1227: 2 de junho de 1155–31 de março de 1227
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrade de Montfort nasceu em 2 de junho de 1155, em Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort III, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Beaumont, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester em 1169. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de março de 1227, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertrade de Montfort родилась 2 июня 1155 г. в местности эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon de Montfort III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Beaumont, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester в 1169 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 31 марта 1227 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.2 June 1155–31 March 1227: 2 de junio de 1155–31 de marzo de 1227
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertrade de Montfort nació el 2 de junio de 1155, en Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort III, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Beaumont, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester en 1169. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1227, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
